title: List Comprehensions
learning_objective: Use a list comprehension with a predicate to keep only the multiples of 3 from a list.
hints: See the "I'm a list comprehension" section of LYAH — Starting Out.
A predicate goes after a comma: [x | x <- xs, <condition>].
A number is a multiple of 3 when x `mod` 3 == 0.
